-- 4 of 7 --

This lesson is key. Here, I’ll teach you my three testing
frameworks. For instance, if your ad is not converting
there are factors you can tweak and test to see what the
problem is. It’s self-diagnosing at its finest.
Here are the questions you should ask:
• 	Is it a change in my store?
• 	Is it a change on Facebook?
• 	Is it a change on my offering?
The 3 Testing Frameworks + Their Tweaks
1. 	Creative Refresh - A fresh new angle, a new
video or set of images that may attract a different
consumer
2. 	Website CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) -
Upgrading page load time, location of post click
landing, A/B testing of site features
3. 	Offer Rotation/Creation - Showcasing a product
differently or restructuring of various products in a
unique and fresh way
LESSON:
THE 3 TESTING
FRAMEWORKS
MODULE:
SCALING WITH
FACEBOOK ADS
“What is the one thing that will drive the most impact
with the least amount of effort.”
ACTION ITEM
❏ 	Look at your store and ask:
Where can I make the most impact with the
least effort? The creative/angle? The offer? The
website?
